headline: A Look At Atmos Energy (ATO) Valuation After Lake Dallas Gas Explosion Lawsuit
summary: The recent gas explosion in Lake Dallas and subsequent lawsuit against Atmos Energy (ATO) has pulled fresh attention to the utility, as investors weigh legal, operational, and reputational questions alongside the company’s long term gas distribution business. See our latest analysis for Atmos Energy. Alongside the Lake Dallas incident and lawsuit, Atmos Energy has also extended the maturity of two US$1.5b revolving credit facilities. The stock’s recent momentum reflects that mix of legal risk...
